delivery.signatureFormat: v1=<hex digest over timestamp dot raw body using endpoint secret>
delivery.disableRule: pause endpoint after repeated terminal delivery failure and alert owner

properties.event_id: globally unique and stable across retries

consumerRules: verify timestamp and signature against the unmodified request body
reject timestamps outside the configured replay tolerance
persist event_id before applying side effects
return 2xx for a previously processed event_id
process aggregate versions in order or park gaps for recovery
do not create a second payment order task earning or payout on retry
retain delivery result and correlation reference for support
